title: topoteretes/cognee
summary: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform for agents, combining knowledge graphs, vector search, multimodal ingestion, tenant isolation, and persistent recall across sessions. The repository was one of the strongest AI-related projects in the day’s GitHub trending candidates.
friendlySummary: Cognee helps AI agents remember information over time using a knowledge graph and search system.
whyItMatters: Teams can use Cognee as a self-hosted long-term memory and knowledge layer for agents that need to remember documents, user preferences, and domain context across sessions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to give an AI assistant a longer-term memory for documents, company knowledge, or user preferences.
